sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_time DateTime, event_type String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO events VALUES (now(), 'click'), (now() - toIntervalDay(1), 'view'), (now() - toIntervalDay(2), 'purchase');
SELECT event_type, tumble(event_time, toIntervalDay(1)) AS window FROM events GROUP BY event_type, window;
UPDATE events SET event_type = 'interaction' WHERE event_type = 'click' AND event_time >= now() - toIntervalDay(1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time >= now() - toIntervalDay(5) GROUP BY tumble(event_time, toIntervalDay(1));
